title: LinkedIn Jobs Search Scraper ($0.30/1k results)
description: Search public LinkedIn job listings via Google with an automatic LinkedIn jobs page constraint.

query.title: Job Search Query
query.description: Job search query. Include role, company, seniority, location, or hiring keywords. Empty input defaults to a narrow US example query.

num.title: Results Per Page
num.description: Number of results to return. Scrappa accepts 1 to 20 results per page.

page.title: Page
page.description: Page number for pagination. Use either page or start, not both.

start.title: Start Index
start.description: Starting result index for pagination. Use either start or page, not both.

hl.title: Interface Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code for Google's interface, for example en, de, es, or fr.

gl.title: Geolocation Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code for geolocation, for example us, de, uk, or fr.

lr.title: Language Restrict
lr.description: Restrict results to a language, for example lang_en or lang_de.

cr.title: Country Restrict
cr.description: Restrict results to a country, for example countryUS or countryDE.

dateRestrict.title: Date Restrict
dateRestrict.description: Filter by date range, for example d7, w1, m1, or y1.

sort.title: Sort
sort.description: Sort parameter supported by Google Search, for example date.

rights.title: Usage Rights
rights.description: Usage-rights filter supported by Google Search.
